message:
feat(clipboard): replace manual clipboard tool chain with OSC52 via ftui-extras

Overhaul clipboard operations to use ftui-extras Clipboard::auto()
which provides a robust auto-detection chain:

- OSC52 escape sequence (works over SSH, tmux, screen passthrough)
- Fallback to external tools (pbcopy/wl-copy/xclip/xsel)
- Remove 40+ lines of manual command_exists/spawn/pipe clipboard code

Also add toast notifications for all clipboard operations (copy snippet,
copy path, copy content, bulk copy, JSON export) using the toast manager
with Success/Error types, providing clear visual feedback alongside the
status bar message.

Remove unused ftui_extras::clipboard import from top-level (now imported
at point-of-use in the non-test copy_to_clipboard function).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
